target:configuration-properties.target:property: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> <namedConfiguration CLASS_NAME="com.fiorano.services.libraries.t24.model.TAFJConnectionConfiguration" xmlns:ns2="uri:com.fiorano.services.common.jaxb.adapter"> <passwordFromVault>false</passwordFromVault> <customPasswordEncryption>false</customPasswordEncryption> <securityPrincipal>R22DC</securityPrincipal> <securityCredential>AgURoX7Xaac5rt9rBeccfg==</securityCredential> <applicationServer>JBoss 7.2</applicationServer> <lookupProperties> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">TafjEjbBeanName</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">IntegrationFrameworkServiceBeanTAFJOBOFS</ns2:value> </ns2:property> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">RemoteConnectionHosts</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">trx.lolc.com.kh</ns2:value> </ns2:property> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">RemoteConnectionPorts</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">9089</ns2:value> </ns2:property> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">TAFJSSL</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">false</ns2:value> </ns2:property> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">T24ProductIds</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">AK</ns2:value> </ns2:property> <ns2:property> <ns2:key xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">RemoteServerType</ns2:key> <ns2:value xsi:type="xs:string" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">JBoss 7.2</ns2:value> </ns2:property> </lookupProperties> <nodeName>node1</nodeName> </namedConfiguration>
